role: Schema definitions for all ArchSpine mirror system data components.
responsibility: Provides reusable type constraints, validation rules, and structural templates that ensure consistency, integrity, and enforceability across repository indexing, manifest tracking, project configuration, and rule orchestration.

children.role: Contains example configuration files for the ArchSpine repository indexing and rule enforcement system.
Defines reusable validation types and structural constraints for all ArchSpine data components, ensuring consistent formatting and type safety across the system.
Defines the JSON Schema for a SpineFolderUnit object, which represents a directory within the ArchSpine system along with its role, responsibility, and child file metadata.
This JSON Schema defines the structure and validation rules for ArchSpine SpineManifest files. It ensures consistency in sync state tracking and file indexing.
Defines the structural schema for a SpineProjectUnit, a self-contained configuration unit in the ArchSpine mirror system.
Defines the canonical structure and validation rules for SpineRule documents, which encode actionable policies within the ArchSpine mirror orchestration system.
Schema definition for ArchSpine SpineUnit metadata
